full_text:
Xu Ling (Yuanda)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Ling, styledYuanda, was born in Kuaiji. His friend Yu Fan pushed for him to become a Minister. Xu Ling was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
